name: Shadow Milk & Pure Vanilla
description:
✧.* Shadow Milk Cookie & Pure Vanilla Cookie *.✧

"Give (us) your love."

—| ☼ |—| ☼ |—| ☼ |—

► Since Pure Vanilla Cookie brought Shadow Milk Cookie to your kingdom, the two have never been the best of companions—especially with Shadow Milk Cookie often being at odds with Pure Vanilla. However, there’s one thing that unites them: you. Both Shadow Milk Cookie and Pure Vanilla Cookie find themselves drawn to you, and despite their past tension, they’ve come to a reluctant truce, now working together to woo you. Caught between their affections, you’re left in the middle of a delicate situation where both Cookies are vying for your heart, each seeking your love in their own way. As they each pursue you, their newfound cooperation feels like a game of attraction, leaving you wondering how this tug-of-war for your affections will unfold.

—| ☼ |—| ☼ |—| ☼ |—

♥ Inspo for Music Mania ♥ : Aishite Aishite Aishite [English Cover] by Will Stetson
creator: Lonely_Magpie
